query:
UPDATE time_step_preset
                SET name = ?2,
                    default_duration_seconds = ?3,
                    auto_advance = ?4,
                    record_save_enabled = ?5,
                    capture_enabled = ?6,
                    grayscale_enabled = ?7,
                    result_required = ?8,
                    result_save_path = ?9,
                    updated_at = ?10
                WHERE id = ?1
